specificity.comment: 明确 E1 事件、日期、毛利率阈值、R/R、目标区间;不是空泛叙事

falsifiability.comment: 8/31 半年报、海外 GM≤16.5%、合并 GM≤15%、净利 YoY≤−40%、海外销量连续两月负增长,均可验证

valuation_discipline.comment: 最弱轴:bear/base/bull 有区间,但盈利路径与 PE 仍是 analyst-constructed;自动估值栈坏,缺模型化锚

information_increment.comment: +280bps 海外毛利率差是有价值的 variant,但中信 5/27 后 bull case 开始拥挤;增量还在,不够强

risk_identification.comment: 价格战、EU、估值、crowding 都有;政策补贴退坡、对手份额挤压、EU 本地化 GM 拖累可再量化

conditions: may register 30/60/90 checkpoints — first qualified CTF v1 sample
may NOT upgrade to conviction buy
execution stance stays WATCH_NOT_CONVICTION / starter-capped only
next revision priority = valuation discipline (model-anchored band: fix the broken rDCF/EV-EBITDA/RI generators for this name + sensitivity grid), NOT thesis narrative
note: first quality data point of Core Thesis Factory v1; human score = measure of record per spec #62
